title: Lost_Civilization:Architecture
description: A modpack for architects, offering mods such as Building Assist and Building Cube Expansion.
body:
_This modpack was made for my building project.
You can use it in your own building projects. The version of the pack and the content of the mods are completely updated according to the needs of my building project, if you have a better idea you can let me know._

# **Main features of the Modpack**:
## 1. WorldEditer mod.
You can easily finish your building using wood axe + commands.
## 2. Axiom mod.
This mod modifies the touch distance, the way of flying, and even the floating placement of cubes.
It also provides the ability to have multiple shortcut bars, so you can hold down the ALT key and use the mouse to view the details during gameplay.
Of course it has another feature, when you press the right Shift key on your keyboard, you go into editor mode!
## 3.FreeCam mod.
You can freely observe your buildings through a special flight view.
## 4.Chisels And Bits mod.
You can use chisels to sculpt the original MineCraft cubes to make them look the way you want.
## 5. Other Mods.
Other mods are not introduced, such as better half-brick destruction, more building cubes, light and shadow support mods, mini-map mods, and so on. All of these you can discover inadvertently during the building process!
